use_cases: Hero section headings with animated character-by-character text reveal
Feature titles on landing pages that animate on scroll into view
Branding text with animated gradient underline effects
Marketing headlines that create visual interest and engagement
Section headers with playful spring-based letter entrance animations
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-powered animated text component that reveals text character-by-character using spring physics animations. Features an optional gradient underline that animates in after the text appears, making it ideal for hero sections and impactful headings. Highly customizable with gradient colors, timing, and semantic HTML tag options.
